name: goalfydata
description: Use when users need deep data analysis (multi-round SQL queries, aggregations, trend comparisons) or want to persist data (Excel / CSV / API / database) as long-lived, cross-platform structured assets — typical scenarios include: complex or recurring data analysis, accessing the same data across multiple Agents / services / devices, sharing data for collaboration, and building dashboards from data for public deployment and sharing. GoalfyData is independent of any single project or conversation, covering the complete dataset lifecycle from table creation, import, query analysis, governance rules, permission sharing, credential management, scheduled auto-updates to dashboard deployment.
